# Refer to https://github.com/evilmartians/lefthook/blob/master/docs/configuration.md

    analyze:
      root: music_tag_editor/
      glob: "*.dart"

--- FILE: C:\Users\joaom\Documents\GitHub\Music\installer.iss ---
#define MyAppName "Music Tag Editor"
#ifndef MyAppVersion
#define MyAppVersion "1.0.0"
#endif
#define MyAppPublisher "João Magdaleno"
#define MyAppExeName "music_tag_editor.exe"

[Setup]
AppId={{B8F4D9E2-6E8C-4863-9E5B-3F1A7C6F9A1B}
AppName={#MyAppName}
AppVersion={#MyAppVersion}
AppPublisher={#MyAppPublisher}
DefaultDirName={autopf}\{#MyAppName}
DisableProgramGroupPage=yes
OutputBaseFilename=MusicTagEditorSetup-{#MyAppVersion}
OutputDir=Output
Compression=lzma
SolidCompression=yes
ArchitecturesInstallIn64BitMode=x64

[Files]
Source: "music_tag_editor\build\windows\x64\runner\Release\*"; DestDir: "{app}"; Flags: ignoreversion recursesubdirs createallsubdirs

[Icons]
Name: "{autoprograms}\{#MyAppName}"; Filename: "{app}\{#MyAppExeName}"
Name: "{autodesktop}\{#MyAppName}"; Filename: "{app}\{#MyAppExeName}"; Tasks: desktopicon

[Tasks]
Name: desktopicon; Description: "Create a desktop shortcut"; GroupDescription: "Additional icons:"; Flags: unchecked

[Run]
Filename: "{app}\{#MyAppExeName}"; Description: "{cm:LaunchProgram,{#StringChange(MyAppName, '&', '&&')}}"; Flags: nowait postinstall shellexec

[UninstallDelete]
Type: filesandordirs; Name: "{userappdata}\music_tag_editor"
Type: filesandordirs; Name: "{userappdata}\com.example\music_tag_editor"
Type: files; Name: "{userdocs}\startup_log.txt"

--- FILE: C:\Users\joaom\Documents\GitHub\Music\.github\workflows\build-and-package.yml ---
name: Build and Package

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  workflow_call:

jobs:
  build-android:
    name: Android 🤖
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    env:
      APK_PATH: ""
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install Flutter
        uses: subosito/flutter-action@v2
        with:
          flutter-version: '3.38.2'
          cache: true

      - name: Configure Firebase
        shell: bash
        env:
          FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART: ${{ secrets.FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p music_tag_editor/lib
          echo "$FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART" > music_tag_editor/lib/firebase_options.dart

      - name: Setup Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'zulu'
          java-version: '17'
          cache: 'gradle'

      - name: Generate Version Info
        id: generate_version
        shell: bash
        run: |
          # Robust extraction ignoring comments and empty space
          VERSION=$(grep -m 1 "^version:" music_tag_editor/pubspec.yaml | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's/[^0-9.]*//g')
          if [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == refs/tags/v* ]]; then
            FULL_VERSION="${{ github.ref_name }}"
          elif [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == "refs/heads/dev" ]]; then
            FULL_VERSION="${VERSION}-dev.${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"
          else
            FULL_VERSION="${VERSION}-local.${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"
          fi

          sed -i "s/^version:.*/version: $FULL_VERSION/" music_tag_editor/pubspec.yaml
          echo "$FULL_VERSION" > music_tag_editor/version.txt
          echo "full_version=$FULL_VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Flutter Pub Get
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: flutter pub get

      - name: Configure Android Firebase
        shell: bash
        env:
          GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON }}
        run: |
          echo "$GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON" > music_tag_editor/android/app/google-services.json

      - name: Setup Android Signing
        env:
          UPLOAD_SIGNING_KEY: ${{ secrets.UPLOAD_SIGNING_KEY }}
          UPLOAD_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.UPLOAD_STORE_PASSWORD }}
          UPLOAD_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.UPLOAD_KEY_PASSWORD }}
          UPLOAD_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.UPLOAD_KEY_ALIAS }}
        run: |
          echo $UPLOAD_SIGNING_KEY | base64 --decode > music_tag_editor/android/app/upload-keystore.jks
          echo "storePassword=$UPLOAD_STORE_PASSWORD" > music_tag_editor/android/key.properties
          echo "keyPassword=$UPLOAD_KEY_PASSWORD" >> music_tag_editor/android/key.properties
          echo "keyAlias=$UPLOAD_KEY_ALIAS" >> music_tag_editor/android/key.properties
          echo "storeFile=../app/upload-keystore.jks" >> music_tag_editor/android/key.properties

      - name: Flutter Build APK
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: |
          mkdir -p debug-info
          # Only obfuscate on tags for speed in dev
          BUILD_COMMAND="flutter build apk --release --split-per-abi --target-platform=android-arm64"
          if [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == refs/tags/v* ]]; then
            BUILD_COMMAND="$BUILD_COMMAND --obfuscate --split-debug-info=debug-info"
          fi
          # Ensure we catch errors from build even with tee
          set -o pipefail
          $BUILD_COMMAND | tee size_analysis.log

      - name: The Cartographer 🗺️ (Size Analysis Summary)
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: |
          echo "### 🗺️ Size Cartography: Top Contributors" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          # Extract the table between the horizontal lines in the analyze-size output
          grep -A 20 "Dart SDK" size_analysis.log | head -n 25 >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY || echo "Size analysis table not found" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "Detailed analysis available in [DevTools](https://docs.flutter.dev/perf/app-size#using-the-app-size-tool)." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

      - name: Flutter Build App Bundle (AAB)
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: |
          flutter build appbundle --release --obfuscate --split-debug-info=debug-info

      - name: Find and Audit APK 🤖
        run: |
          # Search anywhere in build/app/outputs for .apk
          APK_PATH=$(find music_tag_editor/build/app/outputs -name "*.apk" | head -n 1)
          if [ -z "$APK_PATH" ]; then
            echo "::error::APK not found! Listing build directory for diagnostics:"
            find music_tag_editor/build -maxdepth 4
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "APK_PATH=$APK_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          APK_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$APK_PATH")
          THRESHOLD=80000000 # 80MB
          echo "APK Size: $APK_SIZE bytes"
          if [ "$APK_SIZE" -gt "$THRESHOLD" ]; then
            echo "::warning title=Hermes 📦 Alert::APK size ($APK_SIZE bytes) exceeds the 80MB threshold!"
          fi

      - name: Upload APK Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: android-apk
          path: ${{ env.APK_PATH }}

      - name: Upload AAB Artifact
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: android-aab
          path: music_tag_editor/build/app/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab

      - name: Generate Job Summary
        run: |
          APK_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "${{ env.APK_PATH }}")
          APK_SIZE_MB=$(echo "scale=2; $APK_SIZE / 1048576" | bc)
          echo "## Android Build Summary 📦" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Version**: ${{ steps.generate_version.outputs.full_version }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **APK Size**: $APK_SIZE_MB MB" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          
          if [ -f music_tag_editor/build/app/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab ]; then
            AAB_SIZE=$(stat -c%s music_tag_editor/build/app/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab)
            AAB_SIZE_MB=$(echo "scale=2; $AAB_SIZE / 1048576" | bc)
            echo "- **AAB Size**: $AAB_SIZE_MB MB (Store Ready 🚀)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi

          if [ "$APK_SIZE" -gt 80000000 ]; then echo "- **Health**: WARNING ⚠️ (APK > 80MB)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          else echo "- **Health**: Optimal ✅" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY; fi

      - name: Record Build Metrics ⏱️
        run: |
          mkdir -p metrics
          APK_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "${{ env.APK_PATH }}")
          echo "{
            \"platform\": \"android\",
            \"version\": \"${{ steps.generate_version.outputs.full_version }}\",
            \"apk_size_bytes\": $APK_SIZE,
            \"timestamp\": \"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",
            \"commit\": \"${{ github.sha }}\"
          }" > metrics/android_telemetry.json

      - name: Upload Telemetry
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: android-telemetry
          path: metrics/android_telemetry.json

  build-windows:
    name: Windows 🪟
    runs-on: windows-latest
    timeout-minutes: 45
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install Flutter
        uses: subosito/flutter-action@v2
        with:
          flutter-version: '3.38.2'
          cache: true

      - name: Generate Version Info
        id: generate_version
        shell: bash
        run: |
          VERSION=$(grep "version:" music_tag_editor/pubspec.yaml | sed 's/version: //' | xargs)
          if [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == refs/tags/v* ]]; then
            FULL_VERSION="${{ github.ref_name }}"
          elif [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == "refs/heads/dev" ]]; then
            FULL_VERSION="1.1.0-dev.${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"
          else
            FULL_VERSION="$VERSION-local.${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"
          fi
          echo "full_version=$FULL_VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Configure Firebase
        shell: bash
        env:
          FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART: ${{ secrets.FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p music_tag_editor/lib
          echo "$FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART" > music_tag_editor/lib/firebase_options.dart

      - name: Flutter Build Windows
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: flutter build windows --release

      - name: Install Inno Setup
        run: choco install innosetup -y

      - name: Package Windows Installer
        run: |
          iscc /DMyAppVersion="${{ steps.generate_version.outputs.full_version }}" installer.iss

      - name: Upload Windows Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: windows-installer
          path: Output/MusicTagEditorSetup-${{ steps.generate_version.outputs.full_version }}.exe

      - name: Record Windows Metrics ⏱️
        shell: bash
        run: |
          mkdir -p metrics
          echo "{
            \"platform\": \"windows\",
            \"timestamp\": \"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",
            \"commit\": \"${{ github.sha }}\"
          }" > metrics/windows_telemetry.json

      - name: Upload Telemetry
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: windows-telemetry
          path: metrics/windows_telemetry.json

  build-linux:
    name: Linux 🐧
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install Flutter
        uses: subosito/flutter-action@v2
        with:
          flutter-version: '3.38.2'
          cache: true

      - name: Generate Version Info
        id: generate_version
        shell: bash
        run: |
          VERSION=$(grep "version:" music_tag_editor/pubspec.yaml | sed 's/version: //' | xargs)
          if [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == refs/tags/v* ]]; then
            FULL_VERSION="${{ github.ref_name }}"
          elif [[ "${{ github.ref }}" == "refs/heads/dev" ]]; then
            FULL_VERSION="1.1.0-dev.${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"
          else
            FULL_VERSION="$VERSION-local.${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"
          fi
          echo "full_version=$FULL_VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Configure Firebase
        shell: bash
        env:
          FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART: ${{ secrets.FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p music_tag_editor/lib
          echo "$FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART" > music_tag_editor/lib/firebase_options.dart

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          # Only install what is strictly necessary and missing
          sudo apt-get install -y libgtk-3-dev liblzma-dev libstdc++-12-dev

      - name: Flutter Build Linux
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: flutter build linux --release

      - name: Compress Linux Build
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: |
          FULL_VERSION="${{ steps.generate_version.outputs.full_version }}"
          cd build/linux/x64/release/bundle
          tar -czf ../../../../../music_tag_editor-linux-v$FULL_VERSION.tar.gz .

      - name: Upload Linux Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: linux-bundle
          path: music_tag_editor/music_tag_editor-linux-v*.tar.gz

  telemetry-aggregation:
    name: Telemetry Aggregation 📊
    needs: [build-android, build-windows]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Download Telemetry
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v6
        with:
          path: incoming-telemetry

      - name: Protosync 🔄
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts
          echo "Aggregating telemetry..."
          cat incoming-telemetry/android-telemetry/android_telemetry.json >> artifacts/global_telemetry.json
          cat incoming-telemetry/windows-telemetry/windows_telemetry.json >> artifacts/global_telemetry.json

      - name: Upload Global Telemetry
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: global-telemetry
          path: artifacts/global_telemetry.json


--- FILE: C:\Users\joaom\Documents\GitHub\Music\.github\workflows\build.yml ---
name: Build, Test & Release

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - dev
      - beta
    tags:
      - 'v*'
    paths-ignore:
      - '**.md'
      - '.gitignore'
      - 'LICENSE'
      - 'docs/**'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - dev
      - beta
    paths-ignore:
      - '**.md'
      - '.gitignore'
      - 'LICENSE'
      - 'docs/**'
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 0 * * *' # Daily at midnight UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: write

env:
  ACTIONS_STEP_DEBUG: true

jobs:
  quality_gate:
    name: Quality Gate
    uses: ./.github/workflows/quality-gate.yml
    permissions:
      contents: write
      pull-requests: write
    secrets: inherit

  build:
    name: Build & Package
    needs: quality_gate
    if: github.event_name == 'push'
    permissions:
      pull-requests: write
    uses: ./.github/workflows/build-and-package.yml
    secrets: inherit

  archive_telemetry:
    name: The Librarian's Index 📚
    if: github.event_name == 'push'
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout data branch
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          ref: coverage-data
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Download all telemetry
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v6
        with:
          path: incoming-telemetry

      - name: Process & Archive 📚
        run: |
          mkdir -p history/metrics
          TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +%Y%m%d_%H%M%SZ)
          echo "### 📚 The Librarian's Index & The Harbinger's Vigil" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          
          # The Harbinger: Regression Tracking Logic
          check_regression() {
            PLATFORM=$1
            CURRENT_SIZE=$2
            LAST_FILE=$(ls -t history/metrics/${PLATFORM}_telemetry_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)
            
            if [ -n "$LAST_FILE" ]; then
              LAST_SIZE=$(cat "$LAST_FILE" | jq -r '.binary_size_bytes // .apk_size_bytes')
              DELTA=$((CURRENT_SIZE - LAST_SIZE))
              DELTA_KB=$((DELTA / 1024))
              
              if [ $DELTA -gt 102400 ]; then # > 100KB
                echo "⚠️ **$PLATFORM Regression Detected!** Size increased by **${DELTA_KB}KB**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
              elif [ $DELTA -lt -102400 ]; then
                echo "✅ **$PLATFORM Optimization Detected!** Size decreased by **${DELTA_KB#-}KB**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
              else
                echo "ℹ️ $PLATFORM size stability: ${DELTA_KB}KB change." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
              fi
            else
              echo "🆕 First telemetry for $PLATFORM established." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            fi
          }

          # Archive coverage (from quality_gate)
          if [ -d "incoming-telemetry/coverage-lcov" ]; then
            sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y rename jq
            npx lcov-parse incoming-telemetry/coverage-lcov/lcov.info > coverage.json
            cp coverage.json history/metrics/coverage_$TIMESTAMP.json
          fi
          
          # Process Android
          if [ -f "incoming-telemetry/telemetry-android/android_telemetry.json" ]; then
            A_SIZE=$(cat incoming-telemetry/telemetry-android/android_telemetry.json | jq -r .apk_size_bytes)
            check_regression "android" $A_SIZE
            cp incoming-telemetry/telemetry-android/android_telemetry.json history/metrics/android_telemetry_$TIMESTAMP.json
          fi

          # Process Windows
          if [ -f "incoming-telemetry/telemetry-windows/windows_telemetry.json" ]; then
            W_SIZE=$(cat incoming-telemetry/telemetry-windows/windows_telemetry.json | jq -r .binary_size_bytes)
            check_regression "windows" $W_SIZE
            cp incoming-telemetry/telemetry-windows/windows_telemetry.json history/metrics/windows_telemetry_$TIMESTAMP.json
          fi
          
          echo "Historical metrics archived in \`coverage-data\` branch." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          
          # The Scribe: Visual Chronology Generation
          generate_scribe_report() {
            echo "# 📜 Hermes: The Scribe's Chronology" > README.md
            echo "Visual record of the project's technical evolution." >> README.md
            echo "" >> README.md
            echo "## 📊 Binary Size Trends (Last 10 Builds)" >> README.md
            echo '```mermaid' >> README.md
            echo 'xychart-beta' >> README.md
            echo '    title "Binary Size Evolution (MB)"' >> README.md
            
            # Extract labels (timestamps)
            LABELS=$(ls -t history/metrics/android_telemetry_*.json | head -n 10 | tac | xargs -I{} basename {} .json | cut -d'_' -f3 | cut -c7-11 | jq -R . | jq -s -c .)
            echo "    x-axis $LABELS" >> README.md
            
            # Extract Android values
            A_VALS=$(ls -t history/metrics/android_telemetry_*.json | head -n 10 | tac | xargs -I{} jq -r '.apk_size_bytes / 1024 / 1024' {} | jq -s -c .)
            echo "    y-axis \"Size (MB)\" 0 -> 100" >> README.md
            echo "    line $A_VALS" >> README.md
            echo '```' >> README.md
            echo "" >> README.md
            echo "## 🛡️ Coverage Stability" >> README.md
            echo '```mermaid' >> README.md
            echo 'xychart-beta' >> README.md
            echo '    title "Code Coverage Percentage"' >> README.md
            C_LABELS=$(ls -t history/metrics/coverage_*.json | head -n 10 | tac | xargs -I{} basename {} .json | cut -d'_' -f2 | cut -c7-11 | jq -R . | jq -s -c .)
            echo "    x-axis $C_LABELS" >> README.md
            C_VALS=$(ls -t history/metrics/coverage_*.json | head -n 10 | tac | xargs -I{} jq -r '.["total-percentage"]' {} | jq -s -c .)
            echo "    y-axis \"Coverage (%)\" 0 -> 100" >> README.md
            echo "    bar $C_VALS" >> README.md
            echo '```' >> README.md
            echo "" >> README.md
            echo "Last updated: $(date -u)" >> README.md
          }
          
          generate_scribe_report
          
          # Archive Documentation (The Chronicler)
          if [ -d "incoming-telemetry/quality-inventory/docs" ]; then
            mkdir -p docs
            cp -r incoming-telemetry/quality-inventory/docs/* docs/
            echo "API Documentation archived in \`coverage-data\` branch." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi

      - name: Commit and Push
        run: |
          git config --global user.name 'github-actions[bot]'
          git config --global user.email 'github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com'
          git add .
          if ! git diff --staged --quiet; then
            git commit -m "docs: Archive CI telemetry and coverage [skip ci]"
            git push
          fi

  pre_release:
    name: Pre-release
    needs: build
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/dev' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/beta')
    uses: ./.github/workflows/prerelease.yml
    permissions:
      contents: write
    secrets: inherit

  release:
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    timeout-minutes: 10
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Download all artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v6
        with:
          path: artifacts

      - name: Create Release and Upload Assets
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          generate_release_notes: true
          body: |
            ## Produção 🚀
            Esta é a versão oficial estável. Verifique o changelog gerado abaixo.
          files: |
            artifacts/windows-installer/MusicTagEditorSetup-*.exe
            artifacts/android-apk/music_tag_editor-v*.apk
            artifacts/linux-release/music_tag_editor-linux-v*.tar.gz
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  cleanup-cache:
    name: 🗑️ Cleanup Old Caches
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
    steps:
      - name: 🧹 Delete caches older than 1 day
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const caches = await github.rest.actions.listActionsCaches({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
            });

            const oneDayMs = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
            const oneDayAgo = Date.now() - oneDayMs;

            for (const cache of caches.data.actions_caches) {
              const createdAt = new Date(cache.created_at).getTime();

              if (createdAt < oneDayAgo) {
                console.log(`Deleting cache ${cache.key} (ID: ${cache.id}) created at ${cache.created_at}`);
                await github.rest.actions.deleteActionsCache({
                  owner: context.repo.owner,
                  repo: context.repo.repo,
                  cache_id: cache.id,
                });
              } else {
                console.log(`Keeping cache ${cache.key} (recent: ${cache.created_at})`);
              }
            }


--- FILE: C:\Users\joaom\Documents\GitHub\Music\.github\workflows\dashboard.yml ---
name: Quality Dashboard
on:
  workflow_run:
    workflows: ["Build, Test & Release"]
    types: [completed]
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  publish:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'success' }}
    permissions:
      contents: write
      pages: write
      id-token: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          ref: coverage-data

      - name: Update History
        run: |
          DATE=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
          if [ ! -f coverage_history.json ]; then echo "[]" > coverage_history.json; fi
          PERCENTAGE=$(jq '.percentage' coverage.json)
          jq ". += [{\"timestamp\": \"$DATE\", \"percentage\": $PERCENTAGE}]" coverage_history.json > temp.json && mv temp.json coverage_history.json

      - name: Generate Dashboard
        run: |
          git checkout main -- scripts/generate_dashboard.py
          python3 scripts/generate_dashboard.py coverage_history.json index.html

      - name: Commit and Push History
        run: |
          git config --global user.name 'github-actions[bot]'
          git config --global user.email 'github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com'
          git add coverage_history.json index.html
          git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "docs: Update coverage history and dashboard [skip ci]"
          git push

      - name: Upload Pages Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: .

      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

--- FILE: C:\Users\joaom\Documents\GitHub\Music\.github\workflows\prerelease.yml ---
name: Pre-release

on:
  workflow_call:

jobs:
  pre-release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Download Windows Installer
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: windows-installer
          path: artifacts/windows-installer
      - name: Download Android APK
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: android-apk
          path: artifacts/android-apk
      - name: Download Version Artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: version-info
          path: artifacts/version-info
      
      - name: Read version
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(find artifacts -type f -name "version.txt" | head -n 1 | xargs cat || echo "0.0.0-unknown")
          echo "full_version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Generate Changelog
        id: changelog
        run: |
          # Fetch changes since last push or last 10 commits if fresh
          CHANGES=$(git log --oneline -n 10 --no-merges | sed 's/^/- /')
          echo "changes<<EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "$CHANGES" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      
      - name: Create Dev Release (Update Existing)
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/dev'
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: dev-latest
          name: Development Build (Dev)
          body: |
            ## O que mudou? 🛠️
            ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.changes }}

            ---
            **Metadados do Build 📦**
            - Versão: `${{ steps.version.outputs.full_version }}`
            - Commit: `${{ github.sha }}`
            - Ambiente: `Development`
          prerelease: true
          generate_release_notes: false
          files: |
            artifacts/windows-installer/*.exe
            artifacts/android-apk/*.apk
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          fail_on_unmatched_files: true

      - name: Create Beta Release (Update Existing)
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/beta'
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: beta-latest
          name: Beta Release
          body: |
            ## O que mudou? ✨
            ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.changes }}

            ---
            **Metadados do Build 📦**
            - Versão: `${{ steps.version.outputs.full_version }}`
            - Commit: `${{ github.sha }}`
            - Ambiente: `Beta`
          prerelease: true
          generate_release_notes: false
          files: |
            artifacts/windows-installer/*.exe
            artifacts/android-apk/*.apk
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          fail_on_unmatched_files: true

      - name: Update latest tag
        run: |
          git config --global user.name 'github-actions[bot]'
          git config --global user.email 'github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com'
          git tag -f ${{ github.ref_name }}-latest
          git push -f origin ${{ github.ref_name }}-latest


--- FILE: C:\Users\joaom\Documents\GitHub\Music\.github\workflows\quality-gate.yml ---
name: Quality Gate

on:
  workflow_call:
    inputs:
      min_coverage:
        description: 'Minimum code coverage percentage'
        required: false
        default: '45'
        type: string

jobs:
  lint:
    name: Lint & Analysis
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install Flutter
        uses: subosito/flutter-action@v2 # v2.16.0
        with:
          flutter-version: '3.38.2'
          cache: true

      - name: Configure Firebase
        shell: bash
        env:
          FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART: ${{ secrets.FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p music_tag_editor/lib
          echo "$FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART" > music_tag_editor/lib/firebase_options.dart
          dart format music_tag_editor/lib/firebase_options.dart

      - name: Cache Pub Dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.pub-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pub-${{ hashFiles('**/pubspec.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pub-

      - name: Flutter Pub Get
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: flutter pub get

      - name: The Inventory 🧪 (Dependency Tree)
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: |
          mkdir -p ../artifacts
          flutter pub deps > ../artifacts/dependency_tree.txt
          echo "### 🧪 The Inventory: Dependency tree exported to artifacts" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

      - name: Check Formatting
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: dart format --set-exit-if-changed .

      - name: Run Flutter Analyzer
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos --no-fatal-warnings

      - name: Security Bastion 🛡️
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: |
          grep -rE "AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}|[0-9a-f]{32}|ghp_[0-9A-Za-z]{36}" . --exclude="firebase_options.dart" --exclude="*.log" || true
          
          echo "### 🛡️ The Shield: Manifest Security Check" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          MANIFEST="android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml"
          if [ -f "$MANIFEST" ]; then
            if grep -q 'android:allowBackup="true"' "$MANIFEST"; then
              echo "- ⚠️ **Warning**: \`android:allowBackup=\"true\"\` detected in Manifest. Consider setting to false for higher security." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            else
              echo "- ✅ Manifest: \`allowBackup\` is secure." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            fi
          fi

      - name: Architecture Guard 🏛️
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: |
          echo "## Architecture Guard 🏛️" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          LARGE_FILES=$(find lib -name "*.dart" | xargs wc -l | awk '$1 > 600' | grep -v "total" || true)
          if [ -z "$LARGE_FILES" ]; then
            echo "✅ No critical file bloat detected." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          else
            echo "⚠️ **Alert: Large Files Detected (> 600 lines)**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "$LARGE_FILES" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi

      - name: The Alchemist's Brew 🧪 (Asset Audit)
        run: python scripts/asset_guard.py >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY || true

      - name: The Inquisitor's Eye 🔦 (Vulnerability Scan)
        uses: google/osv-scanner-action/osv-scanner-action@v2.3.1
        with:
          scan-args: |-
            --recursive
            --require-hashes
            ./music_tag_editor
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: The Chronicler's Archive 📜 (API Documentation)
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: |
          dart doc .
          mkdir -p ../artifacts/docs
          cp -r doc/api/* ../artifacts/docs/
          echo "### 📜 The Chronicler: API Documentation generated" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

      - name: The Warden's Patrol ⚖️ (License Audit)
        run: python scripts/license_warden.py >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY || true

      - name: Upload Quality Artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: quality-inventory
          path: artifacts/

  test:
    name: Unit Tests & Coverage
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install Flutter
        uses: subosito/flutter-action@v2 # v2.16.0
        with:
          flutter-version: '3.38.2'
          cache: true

      - name: Configure Firebase
        shell: bash
        env:
          FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART: ${{ secrets.FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p music_tag_editor/lib
          echo "$FIREBASE_OPTIONS_DART" > music_tag_editor/lib/firebase_options.dart
          dart format music_tag_editor/lib/firebase_options.dart

      - name: Cache Pub Dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.pub-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pub-${{ hashFiles('**/pubspec.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pub-

      - name: Flutter Pub Get
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: flutter pub get

      - name: Run Tests with Auditing 🔦
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        id: test_run
        run: |
          # Use JSON reporter to capture durations while still showing output
          (flutter test --coverage --reporter json | tee test_results.json) || (echo "TEST_FAILED=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV)
          
      - name: The Ghost Hunter's Audit 🔦
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        if: always() && steps.test_run.outcome != 'skipped'
        run: |
          echo "### 🔦 The Ghost Hunter's Lantern: Test Performance Audit" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          if [ -f "test_results.json" ]; then
            echo "| Test Name | Duration (ms) | Result |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "| :--- | :--- | :--- |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            
            # Extract top 5 slowest successful tests
            # We filter for testDone events and join with their names from testStart
            # Note: jq is used to bridge the gap between IDs and names
            cat test_results.json | grep '"type":"testDone"' | \
            jq -r 'select(.hidden == false) | [.time, .testID] | @tsv' | \
            sort -rn | head -n 5 | while read -r time testid; do
              name=$(grep "\"type\":\"testStart\"" test_results.json | jq -r "select(.test.id == $testid) | .test.name")
              echo "| $name | $time | ✅ |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            done
          else
            echo "⚠️ No test results JSON found for auditing." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi
          
          # Finalize exit status
          if [ "$TEST_FAILED" = "true" ]; then
            echo "::error title=Hermes 📦 Alert::Tests failed!"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Dependency Hygiene 🧼
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: |
          echo "## Dependency Hygiene 🧼" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          OUTDATED=$(flutter pub outdated --no-dev-dependencies)
          if echo "$OUTDATED" | grep -q "Upgradeable"; then
            echo "### ⚠️ Updates Available" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "$OUTDATED" | grep "Upgradeable" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          else
            echo "### ✅ All dependencies are up to date!" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi

      - name: Generate HTML coverage report
        working-directory: music_tag_editor
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y lcov
          genhtml coverage/lcov.info -o coverage/html

      - name: Calculate code coverage
        id: coverage
        run: |
          HIT=$(grep "^LH:" music_tag_editor/coverage/lcov.info | awk '{s+=$2} END {print s}' FS=":")
          FOUND=$(grep "^LF:" music_tag_editor/coverage/lcov.info | awk '{s+=$2} END {print s}' FS=":")
          if [ "$FOUND" -eq 0 ]; then
            COVERAGE="0.0"
          else
            COVERAGE=$(echo "scale=2; 100 * $HIT / $FOUND" | bc)
          fi
          echo "percentage=${COVERAGE}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Final Quality Report 📜
        run: |
          echo "## Quality Gate Evidence 📜" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Metric | Status |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| :--- | :--- |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Linter & Formatting** | ✅ (See Lint Job) |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Architecture Guard** | ✅ Scan Complete |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **The Inventory** | ✅ Dependencies Exported |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **The Inquisitor** | ✅ Vulnerability Scan Run |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **The Chronicler** | ✅ API Docs Generated |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **The Warden** | ✅ License Audit Run |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **The Oracle** | ✅ Accessibility Scan |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Tests** | ✅ Passed |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Line Coverage** | ${{ steps.coverage.outputs.percentage }}% |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          
          if (( $(echo "${{ steps.coverage.outputs.percentage }} < ${{ inputs.min_coverage }}" | bc -l) )); then
            echo "### ❌ Quality Gate Failed: Coverage below ${{ inputs.min_coverage }}%" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Upload Test Report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: music_tag_editor/test_results.json

      - name: Upload Coverage
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: coverage-report
          path: music_tag_editor/coverage/html

  pr-proclamation:
    name: Hermes' Proclamation 📣
    needs: [lint, test]
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      pull-requests: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Post PR Comment
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          gh pr comment ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }} --body "## 📦 Hermes: Proclamação do Arauto
          O seu build passou pelo **Portão de Qualidade** com sucesso! ✨

--- FILE: C:\Users\joaom\Documents\GitHub\Music\music_tag_editor\calculate_coverage.dart ---
import 'dart:io';

void main() {
  final lcovFile = File('coverage/lcov.info');
  if (!lcovFile.existsSync()) {
    // ignore: avoid_print
    print(
        'Error: coverage/lcov.info not found. Run "flutter test --coverage" first.');
    exit(1);
  }

  final lines = lcovFile.readAsLinesSync();
  int totalLines = 0;
  int coveredLines = 0;
  final Map<String, List<int>> fileCoverage = {};
  String? currentFile;

  for (final line in lines) {
    if (line.startsWith('SF:')) {
      currentFile = line.substring(3);
      fileCoverage[currentFile] = [0, 0]; // [covered, total]
    } else if (line.startsWith('DA:')) {
      final parts = line.substring(3).split(',');
      if (parts.length == 2) {
        final count = int.parse(parts[1]);
        fileCoverage[currentFile]![1]++;
        if (count > 0) {
          fileCoverage[currentFile]![0]++;
        }
      }
    } else if (line == 'end_of_record') {
      totalLines += fileCoverage[currentFile]![1];
      coveredLines += fileCoverage[currentFile]![0];
      currentFile = null;
    }
  }

  // ignore: avoid_print
  print('Coverage Breakdown (Top 20 files by size):');
  final sortedFiles = fileCoverage.entries.toList()
    ..sort((a, b) => b.value[1].compareTo(a.value[1]));

  for (final entry in sortedFiles.take(20)) {
    final covered = entry.value[0];
    final total = entry.value[1];
    final pct = (covered / total * 100).toStringAsFixed(1);
    // ignore: avoid_print
    print('${entry.key}: $pct% ($covered/$total)');
  }

  final totalPct = (coveredLines / totalLines * 100).toStringAsFixed(2);
  // ignore: avoid_print
  print('\nTotal Lines: $totalLines');
  // ignore: avoid_print
  print('Covered Lines: $coveredLines');
  // ignore: avoid_print
  print('Total Coverage: $totalPct%');
}


--- FILE: C:\Users\joaom\Documents\GitHub\Music\music_tag_editor\calc_coverage.py ---
import re
import os

lf = 0
lh = 0
lcov_path = 'coverage/lcov.info'

if os.path.exists(lcov_path):
    with open(lcov_path, 'r') as f:
        for line in f:
            m_lf = re.search(r'LF:(\d+)', line)
            if m_lf:
                lf += int(m_lf.group(1))
            m_lh = re.search(r'LH:(\d+)', line)
            if m_lh:
                lh += int(m_lh.group(1))
    if lf > 0:
        print(f"LF: {lf}, LH: {lh}, Coverage: {round(lh/lf*100, 2)}%")
    else:
        print("No lines found in lcov.info")
else:
    print("lcov.info not found")


--- FILE: C:\Users\joaom\Documents\GitHub\Music\music_tag_editor\dart_test.yaml ---
# dart_test.yaml - Optimized Test Configuration for Music Project
# Run unit tests fast: flutter test --tags unit
# Run widget tests: flutter test --tags widget

# Maximum parallelism for fast execution
concurrency: 8

# Aggressive timeout to catch hanging tests early
timeout: 15s

# Define custom tags for categorizing tests
tags:
  unit:
    # Fast unit tests - no widget framework needed
    timeout: 5s
  widget:
    # Widget tests with UI rendering
    timeout: 15s
  slow:
    # Tests requiring animations or external resources
    timeout: 30s
  golden:
    # Screenshot comparison tests - run separately
  integration:
    # Full integration tests - run in CI only

# Presets will be added when golden/integration tests are created
# flutter test --preset ci
# flutter test --preset fast
